task_completion.description: Navigate to the E-Commerce Platform project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project header or sidebar displays 'E-Commerce Platform', indicating the agent is within the correct project.
'Boards' is selected in the project sidebar, and the main area shows the boards list or board creation interface.
During board creation, the 'Status' board type (or action board based on status) is selected in the modal or interface.
The board title is explicitly set to 'Design Workflow Board' in the creation modal or at the top of the created board view.

task_completion.description: Add columns for 'New' and 'In progress' statuses
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Design Workflow Board' displays at least two columns with the headers 'New' and 'In progress'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to interact with OpenProject
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the OpenProject interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenProject UI is visible and functional, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal or database scripts to create the board
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands or script executions are used to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project identifier is 'ecommerce-platform' (displayed as 'E-Commerce Platform'). The board must be named exactly 'Design Workflow Board'. It must be a 'Status' board (an action board with the attribute 'status'). The board must contain at least 2 columns corresponding to the 'New' and 'In progress' statuses.
